{{Quote|Shrines of Kooroo have been uncovered on several Outer Rim worlds, including Haffrin, Gelgelar, Branteez, Sufezz, and Boztrok.|TriNebulon News report by Andor Javin|<ref name="Journal13" />}}
'''Branteez''' was a terrestrial [[Planet/Legends|world]]<ref name="Journal13" /> located in the [[Branteez system/Legends|Branteez system]], a part of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories']] [[Tolonda sector/Legends|Tolonda sector]].<ref name="EAOC" /> At some point by the [[Great ReSynchronization|date]] [[2 ABY/Legends|38:1:15]], a [[Shrine of Kooroo]],<ref name="Journal13" /> one of a number of stone structures of mysterious origins found on several Outer Rim worlds,<ref name="Journal14">{{JournalCite|14|From the Files of Corellia Antilles}}</ref> had been uncovered on Branteez—a fact which the investigative [[Journalist/Legends|reporter]] [[Andor Javin]] noted in a [[TriNebulon News/Legends|TriNebulon News]] report issued on that date.<ref name="Journal13" />

==Behind the scenes==
Branteez was mentioned in the "[[Galaxywide NewsNets]]" feature of [[West End Games]]' [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 13|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 13]], which was published in [[May]] [[1997]]. The feature was authored by [[Peter M. Schweighofer|Peter Schweighofer]].<ref name="Journal13" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Branteez [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the world Branteez, in grid square Q-17.<ref name="TEA" />
